pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The separate source and target flags are deprecated in favor of the release flag in modern compiler plugins; while not strictly a compile error on older JDKs, it is the required modern pattern for JDK 21 toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a newer snapshot version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may lack full support for JDK 21 class files or features.

registry-core-client/src/main/java/gr/uo.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: logger.debug(String.format("@Retryable 'searchId(resourceType=%s, ids={%s})'", resourceType, String.join(",", Arrays.stream(fields).map(keyValue -> keyValue.getField() + "=" + keyValue.getValue()).collect(Collectors.toSet()))));

registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for exception message construction.
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.before: throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format("Quantity should be up to %s.", maxQuantity));
registry-core-elasticsearch/src/main/jav.after: throw new IllegalArgumentException("Quantity should be up to %s.".formatted(maxQuantity));

registry-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the scope of jakarta.annotation-api to provided to avoid packaging it in the final artifact, as it is expected to be supplied by the runtime environment.

registry-core/src/test/java/gr/uoa/di/ma.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
registry-core/src/test/java/gr/uoa/di/ma.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0; List.getFirst() is the preferred replacement.
